text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
The time has come, at long last! My<n>springtime
hurdle leading to the<n>Classics—my Dragon Gate!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
...You look confused, Trainer. Do you<n>know the
story of the Dragon Gate?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Of course! Long, long ago, in ancient<n>China, it was
said that if a carp could<n>leap to the top of this great
waterfall,<n>it would transform into a dragon.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Which means if I can clear this hurdle,<n>I'll turn into
a dragon too!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: So just for today, the name's<n>Matikarp-streamer!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Carp streamer, high above the<n>rooftops! ♪ A giant
carp swimming in<n>a cool summer stream! ♪
choice_data_list:
Isn't that a Children's Day song? It's only
March...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Singing that tune got me pumped up!<n>Watch me
blast my way up that<n>waterfall and to the finish
line!
